trending_topics.context: 4 posts, 1.4x baseline rate — mentioning LUMIA, EGL1, Kimi K3, Pluralis

sample_posts.text:
Daily news snapshot: Altcoins watchlist
• EGL1 (EGL1): +112.19%
• Market cap: $24.4 million
• BSC-based meme coin with American Spirit and Superhero themes surged 112% in 24 hours.
• The catalyst is unclear; community-driven marketing on social media has been building traction.
Matters because:
The move is sharp but speculative, with limited fundamental catalysts.
2. LUMIA (LUMIA): +25.22%
• Market cap: $12.8 million
• Lumia, an RWA infrastructure platform for tokenization and DeFi connectivity, gained 25% in 24 hours.
• The move may reflect broader institutional interest in RWA infrastructure

RL Post-Training on Macs
Researchers successfully ran a multi-turn reinforcement learning post-training setup by using just 14 MacBooks across 4 countries to generate data and a single, centralized datacenter GPU to perform the training
https://pluralis.ai/blog/rl-post-training-on-macs/

Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence
Moonshot AI has introduced Kimi K3
https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3

How The Fastest AI-First Companies Really Work
Outcome-focused "mission pods" where communication-driven humans work alongside AI agents to accelerate learning, shipping, and customer feedback loops
https://www.nfx.com/post/ai-first-company-structure-mission-pods

convergence.context: 7 posts across 4 channels (shoalresearch, cookiesreads, ahboyashreads, muur_posts) — mentioning Kimi K3, LUMIA, EGL1, Kimi

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/kimi_moonshot/status/2077830229968683203

tweet.text:
Introducing Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence

🔹 2.8 Trillion Parameters, 1 Million Context, Native Multimodal
🔹 Kimi Delta Attention enables up to 6.3x faster decoding in million-token contexts
🔹 Attention Residuals deliver ~25% higher training efficiency at <2% additional cost
🔹 Built for long-horizon agentic coding and self-evolving workflows

Kimi K3 is now live on on http://Kimi.com, Kimi Work, Kimi Code, and the Kimi API.
Open Weights by July 27, 2026.

🔗 API: http://platform.kimi.ai
🔗 Tech blog: http://kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/arena/status/2077824029126504525

tweet.text:
Big news: Kimi-K3 by @Kimi_Moonshot is now #1 in the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 pts, surpassing Claude Fable 5.

This is a 17-place jump from Kimi-k2.6 (#18 -> #1).

In Frontend, Kimi-K3 ranked #1 in 6 of 7 domains: Brand & Marketing, Reference-Based Design, Data & Analytics, Consumer Product, Simulations, and Content Creation Tools, landing #2 only in Gaming behind Fable 5.

The full model weights will be released by July 27.

Congrats to the @Kimi_Moonshot team on this major milestone!

tweet.text:

This is a 17-place jump from Kimi-k2.6 (#18 -> #1).

sample_posts.text:
Ansem Unveils
$ANSEM
Thesis
> He argues that ANSEM combines the viral appeal of memecoins with the sustainable economics of the creator economy to create a new tokenized social network.
> That past creator coins failed due to insider dumping and lack of relatable memes, and envisions ANSEM as the foundation of a $2 trillion tokenized creator economy, leveraging community incentives, creator influence, and onchain ownership to onboard millions into crypto.
Source:
https://x.com/blknoiz06/status/2077815810458870267

Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence
Moonshot AI has introduced Kimi K3
https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3

Kimi
Unveils Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence
> Kimi K3 is a 2.8T-parameter model built on our Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals, with native vision capabilities and a 1-million-token context window.
> Designed for frontier intelligence across long-horizon coding, knowledge work, and reasoning.
Source:
https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3
